title: sample_sfs_v1 — per-sample 1-D folded SFS payload
description: Output of extract_sfs_ml_v1. Source: results_diversity/02_heterozygosity/02_sfs/{sample}.est.ml — two whitespace-separated values (bin0, bin1) emitted by `realSFS -fold 1`.

bins.description: [bin0, bin1] — counts of homozygous-reference (bin0) and heterozygous (bin1) sites in the folded SFS.
